Click Edit names, then click a tile to select it (A+/A− font, orientation, title) or double-click to rename. Move items to drag, Add to insert.

✎ Edit mode: click a name tile to select it (font size / orientation toolbar appears above), double-click to rename. Click ✕ to delete.
⇄ Move mode: drag any item to reposition. Click the red ✕ to delete.
⤡ Resize mode: drag any purple handle to resize. Corners scale both directions, edges scale one. Hold Shift while dragging a corner to keep proportions.
🎨 Color mode: click any item to change its color. Choose a preset palette or pick a custom color.
